sys_user_role.description: This is the submitter role for the document approval app. An user with this role can create documents, read their own documents, edit their own documents when status is not submitted and delete their own documents. They can also read data from document approval category.
sys_user_role.name: x_1871156_ngo_do_0.submitter

sys_update_version.name: sys_user_role_18ba05c064327610eca6b54a6f4cc989
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_user_role"><sys_user_role action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><assignable_by/><can_delegate>true</can_delegate><description>This is the submitter role for the document approval app. An user with this role can create documents, read their own documents, edit their own documents when status is not submitted and delete their own documents. They can also read data from document approval category. </description><elevated_privilege>false</elevated_privilege><federated_id>d+wj25OKRfHDHwfs09eSmK4WJWn5ONUI7fvuHX9lqss=</federated_id><grantable>true</grantable><includes_roles/><name>x_1871156_ngo_do_0.submitter</name><scoped_admin>false</scoped_admin><suffix>submitter</suffix><sys_class_name>sys_user_role</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-27 15:20:24</sys_created_on><sys_id>18ba05c064327610eca6b54a6f4cc989</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_1871156_ngo_do_0.submitter</sys_name><sys_package display_value="NGO Donation & Distribution Management" source="x_1871156_ngo_do_0">40bac1c0d23276105c93871d08abce28</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="NGO Donation & Distribution Management">40bac1c0d23276105c93871d08abce28</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_user_role_18ba05c064327610eca6b54a6f4cc989</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-27 15:20:24</sys_updated_on></sys_user_role></record_update>
